title: Voluminous Energy
description: Generate energy and process materials using familiar and novel machines
body:
NOTE TO 1.18.2 0.4 PLAYERS:

There are two versions, a J9 and a JX release. J9 is for JEI 9.5+ and doesn't work with JEI 10. The JX version is for JEI 10. Choose the correct JAR file for the version of JEI you are using.

About Voluminous Energy

Voluminous Energy is a Minecraft Tech mod focused on adding new machines to the game. Focused around the concept of generating energy using a mix of novel ideas and familiar ones. Voluminous Energy, however, doesn't stop at generators, it adds all the machines you'll need to process materials either in the chain of getting liquid or solid fuels or as an alternative/replacement for other tech mods. Voluminous Energy features elements inspired by various mods from previous versions of Minecraft. The Voluminous Energy project aims to provide more energy choices and tech-centric gameplay to modern versions of modded Minecraft.

 

Join us on Discord:
